title: Baby Bio Automatic Orchid Drip Feeders, 4 x 40ml - Ready To Use Plant Food - Easy Care for Supporting Healthy Growth and Vibrant Flowering
features: AUTOMATIC: Give yourself piece of mind that your Orchid is getting a regular dose of the nutrients it needs with the Baby Bio Orchid Food Drip Feeder
LEAVING WITHOUT WORRY: Offers convenient, worry-free care of your Orchid
EASY TO USE: Each drip feeder lasts for up to 1 month, and is easy to use. Simply cut the tip off and place it tip down in the soil
SEASONAL: Use during the growing season for healthy and vibrant blooms that make your Orchid stand out
INDOOR USE: For use with an Orchid in your home or conservatory for best results
description: From the manufacturer EFFICIENT & EFFECTIVE Baby Bio Orchid Drip Feeders are the perfect solution for orchid lovers who want to keep their plants healthy and vibrant without the hassle of frequent feeding. Designed for convenience, these ready-to-use feeders provide essential nutrients to your orchids. Simply shake, cut the tip, and place the feeder in the pot with the tip in the soil—then water as usual. 4 WEEKS OF FEED With each feeder lasting up to 4 weeks, and no need for measuring or mixing, the drip feeder makes plant care simpler, allowing you to maintain beautiful and vibrant orchids with minimal effort and maximum results. BLOOM ALL YEAR Ideal for use during the growing season, Baby Bio Orchid Drip Feeders support the overall health and vibrancy of your orchids, ensuring they thrive with minimal effort. Whether you're caring for indoor orchids or other houseplants, Baby Bio Orchid Feeders make orchid care simple and effective. Containing essential micro and macro nutrients for supporting healthly orchid growth. Uniquely formulated NPK to support healthy and flowering orchids. An organic formulation containing essential NPK plus seaweed for healthier houseplants. Contains a new, foliar bug treatment, flupyradifurone for the control of sucking pests, such as aphids, whiteflies and many more. A balanced and nutrient rich formulation infused with seaweed. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest. If ingested, seek medical attention immediately. Always wear gloves when handling. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and open flames. Do not use on food crops. Do not dispose of in water or with household waste. May be harmful to aquatic life with long-term effects.
